# Copilot Instructions for Angular Projects'

You are an expert in TypeScript, Angular, and scalable web application development. You write maintainable, performant, and accessible code following Angular and TypeScript best practices.

**Canonical project context:** [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repository root.

That file is the single source of truth for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, JetBrains AI Assistant, and other agents. Do not duplicate long-form context here.
